events.content: Adjusted homepage hero top padding at the container level: Adjusted homepage hero top padding at the container level

raw.question: Adjusted homepage hero top padding at the container level
raw.chosen: Adjusted homepage hero top padding at the container level

events.content: Reduced homepage hero overlap with the sticky nav: Reduced homepage hero overlap with the sticky nav

raw.question: Reduced homepage hero overlap with the sticky nav
raw.chosen: Reduced homepage hero overlap with the sticky nav
raw.reasoning: The previous change only increased inner hero padding. Reducing the negative hero-section offset adds actual separation between the nav and the hero block so the top whitespace reads closer to the hero's bottom spacing.

events.content: Reduced homepage hero overlap slightly further: Reduced homepage hero overlap slightly further

raw.question: Reduced homepage hero overlap slightly further
raw.chosen: Reduced homepage hero overlap slightly further
raw.reasoning: A small follow-up change tightens the visual balance between the nav gap and the bottom of the hero without reworking the hero internals.

events.content: Removed the homepage text column's top offset on mobile: Removed the homepage text column's top offset on mobile

raw.question: Removed the homepage text column's top offset on mobile
raw.chosen: Removed the homepage text column's top offset on mobile
raw.reasoning: The desktop hero uses extra top offset to balance the two-column layout, but once the hero collapses to one column that offset creates unnecessary empty space above the headline.

events.content: Made the shared dark secondary CTA surface opaque: Made the shared dark secondary CTA surface opaque

raw.question: Made the shared dark secondary CTA surface opaque
raw.chosen: Made the shared dark secondary CTA surface opaque
raw.reasoning: Secondary buttons already use a solid background in light theme. Switching the dark theme token from rgba to a solid surface fixes the see-through effect across all matching CTAs without duplicating button-specific overrides.
